section.heading: Office of Energy Policy and New Uses

content.p: The Secretary shall establish for the Department, in the Office of the Secretary, an Office of Energy Policy and New Uses.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 103–354, title II, § 220, as added Pub. L. 105–185, title VI, § 602, June 23, 1998, 112 Stat. 585.)
